raw_responses.BFI-10_1: Based on the interview, Ryan seems to be someone who values family and relationships deeply but also prioritizes his privacy and personal space. His comments about his relationships and the value he places on trust suggest that he is more inclined to be trusting rather than overly cautious. Given his overall outlook and the emphasis on trust in his responses, it seems he leans towards being generally trusting.
